articles.title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow rise as tech gains, US and Iran call to halt attacks - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: A halt to Mideast hostilities after the weekend flare-up is helping buoy market spirits.
articles.content:
US stocks climbed on Monday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average (^DJI) closing above 52,000 for the first time as Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) shares and other tech stocks advanced.
